taskDescription: Story 9.3: Epic 级仪表盘聚合

userStories.title: aggregateByEpicOnly
userStories.description: 筛选 epicId 匹配且 timestamp 在 windowHours 内
acceptanceCriteria: 单测 epic=9 仅返回 E9.*

userStories.title: getEpicAggregateRecords
userStories.description: 按 epic:story 分组取最新完整 run 合并
acceptanceCriteria: S1+S2 各完整 run 返回 6 条；S3 仅 1 stage 不包含

userStories.title: getEpicDimensionScores
userStories.description: 每 Story getDimensionScores 后维度平均
acceptanceCriteria: 2 Story 各 2 维合并平均正确

userStories.title: getLatestRunRecordsV2 epic-only
acceptanceCriteria: epic=9 仅含 E9 records；run_id 时 epic 忽略

userStories.title: dashboard-generate epic-only
acceptanceCriteria: --epic 9 输出 Epic 9 聚合视图

userStories.title: formatDashboardMarkdown 扩展
acceptanceCriteria: Epic 9 聚合视图、已排除列表

userStories.title: CLI 文档化
userStories.description: epic/story 过滤仅 epic_story_window 有效

userStories.title: Epic 聚合 fixture 与集成测试
acceptanceCriteria: epic 聚合、部分不完整、run_id 忽略、无完整 Story、单 Story 不变
